'''ngazunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaboard|seaboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaboard|seaboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngazunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzinith|ngæzinith]] || [[word:ngæzinij|ngæzinij]] || [[word:ngæzinish|ngæzinish]] || [[word:ngæzini|ngæzini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazuzunuth|ngazuzunuth]] || [[word:ngazuzunuj|ngazuzunuj]] || [[word:ngazuzunush|ngazuzunush]] || [[word:ngazuzunu|ngazuzunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazunuth|ngazunuth]] || [[word:ngazunuj|ngazunuj]] || [[word:ngazunush|ngazunush]] || [[word:ngazunu|ngazunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazufnuth|ngazufnuth]] || [[word:ngazufnuj|ngazufnuj]] || [[word:ngazufnush|ngazufnush]] || [[word:ngazufnuf|ngazufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazunuthu|ngazunuthu]] || [[word:ngazunuju|ngazunuju]] || [[word:ngazunushu|ngazunushu]] || [[word:ngazunuku|ngazunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazunuth|ngazunuth]] || [[word:ngazunuj|ngazunuj]] || [[word:ngazunush|ngazunush]] || [[word:ngazunu|ngazunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazunuthul|ngazunuthul]] || [[word:ngazunujul|ngazunujul]] || [[word:ngazunushul|ngazunushul]] || [[word:ngazunukul|ngazunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazunuthuthu|ngazunuthuthu]] || [[word:ngazunujuju|ngazunujuju]] || [[word:ngazunushushu|ngazunushushu]] || [[word:ngazunuku|ngazunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazunuthun|ngazunuthun]] || [[word:ngazunujun|ngazunujun]] || [[word:ngazunushun|ngazunushun]] || [[word:ngazunukun|ngazunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazunuthuoro|ngazunuthuoro]] || [[word:ngazunujuoro|ngazunujuoro]] || [[word:ngazunushuoro|ngazunushuoro]] || [[word:ngazunukuoro|ngazunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
